title: First Conference of Free Peoples

{{Quote|We must decide how best to enjoy and preserve our hard won freedom.|Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 90">[[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]]</ref>}}
The '''First Conference of Free Peoples''' was a meeting of delegates hosted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The Rebel Alliance [[Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets|established]] a [[Alliance of Free Planets|interim goverment]] as part of its formal transition into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
The First Conference of Free Peoples took place after the end of the [[Bakura Incident]],<ref name="TFW">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref> about one week after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TTaBS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>
[[File:ConferenceGroup.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A group of delegates listen to Admiral Ackbar.]]
Held shortly after the major defeat of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the conference established the transitional government known as the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]. The conference was attended by representatives of the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], [[Bith/Legends|Bith]], [[Em'liy/Legends|Em'liy]], [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]], [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]], [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolans]], [[Pinurquian]], [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]], [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]], [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]], and [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] species. Attended by representatives from numerous free worlds, the conference dealt with such issues as trade, taxation, and the adjudication and administration of a new body of interplanetary laws.

The conference was hosted by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], the incumbent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leaders, and made decisions by a simple majority vote. The major product of the conference was the [[Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets]].
